candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line, but appears to be a subtotal identical to Net sales.
Primary top-line sales/revenue line and more specific than subtotal Total Revenue.

candidates.why: Not total revenue; this is other operating revenue/inventory change, not the main top-line.

variables.notes: Use Net sales as primary revenue line; Total Revenue included as fallback priority label if reporting changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct production input cost on the income statement; best match for COGS.

candidates.why: Operating overhead personnel cost; valid SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not expense.

variables.notes: No clear income statement R&D expense line exists. Supplemental amortization and balance sheet R&D asset lines should not be used as XRD expense.

candidates.why: Broader finance cost line that includes more than pure interest expense.
Specific interest-related line but limited to pension plans only.

Interest-related but appears to be a component/sub-detail rather than the main reported interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest supplemental detail, narrower than total interest expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Primary choice is the explicit interest expense line. Finance expenses included only as fallback if labeling changes in other periods.

candidates.why: Only one equity component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to owners
candidates.why: Best match for parent/owners' equity excluding non-controlling interests.

Balancing row, not a reported equity line.
Balancing row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to owners

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity line to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.
